summary: Completed end-to-end backend + frontend testing for Leave Requests, Bulk Concessions, Student Promotion (fee carryover), Approvals unified page with role-based tab visibility, Parent Portal Leave tab, and Fees Concessions bulk UI. All 20 backend pytest cases pass and all 3 frontend flows verified successfully. No regressions observed.

minor.issue: Task description mentions GET but implementation is POST. Keep as POST (semantically correct for action endpoint). Frontend already calls via api.sendFeeReminders (POST). Just a spec-wording mismatch.

issues: Tab buttons (Overview/Attendance/Fees/Events/Homework/Leave) have NO data-testid. Worked around with role=button name filter. Recommend adding data-testid=`parent-tab-{key}` for future test stability.

action_items: (Low) Add data-testid attributes to Parent Portal tab buttons for robustness
(Info only) Align docs: /api/fees/send-reminders is POST (not GET)
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~1586 lines, single file - violates 'files >700 lines' guideline. Recommend splitting into routers (students, fees, concessions, leave, attendance, homework, etc.).

Login endpoint returns no JWT/session token; authentication is effectively role-only and trust-based. For production, add token auth and validate on protected routes. Not in scope for this iteration but critical for security.

promote_students correctly rolls ALL pending dues (T1+T2+T3) into new Term1 and resets T2/T3 to original values. Verified with assertion (1000 paid 400 -> pending 600; T2 2000; T3 3000 -> new T1=5600, T2=2000, T3=3000).
concessions/bulk correctly reports 'created' count and per-code 'errors' list for invalid codes.
leave-requests supports both studentId and studentCode lookup with 404 fallback. Approve/reject correctly reject already-processed with 400.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Approvals admin+teacher, Parent Portal leave, Fees concessions bulk UI all pass)

seed_data_creation: Backend pytest creates disposable TEST_* students (fatherName/motherName/address populated) and cleans them up. Parent-portal frontend test submitted a new leave under student Ali (studentCode 4543) with reason 'TEST_parent_portal_leave_reason_xyz' - remains in DB as pending.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py is the canonical regression suite. Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v. Use credentials map above. Parent Portal tab buttons lack data-testid (click by role+name 'Leave'). No console errors observed on Approvals or Parent Portal Leave tab.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - no bugs found in this iteration. Previous send_fee_reminders orphaned-code bug confirmed fixed (endpoint returns 200 with {message, feeTypesChecked}).
